productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Sandals
description: Referencing the distressed leather aesthetic of the Wild West, this pair of sandals from red tape are crafted to add a subtle polish to your off-duty ensemble. Wear this with rolled up jeans and an understated tee.UpperCriss-cross leather straps for durability and comfort with a toe holderLeather and stitch detailing on leather strap for added attractionFirm footbed  for extra support in all-day wearBranding on footbed with nubuck detail on the forefoot region with perforationsOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionTextured lugs all over the footbed for improved grip on all surfacesSandal careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
